ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Commercial terms and timing remain subject to Board approval; premature disclosure could influence trading and breach information barriers.

ESG-linked financing: Bintang Raya Capital Bank Berhad has offered a RM150m sustainability-linked term loan with a 15 bps margin step-down if FY2026 Scope 1 emissions fall 12% year-on-year, and a 10 bps step-up if targets are missed; the draft facility agreement is under NDA.

must_detect.matched_text: Commercial terms and timing remain subject to Board approval; premature disclosure could influence trading and breach information barriers.

ESG-linked financing: Bintang Raya Capital Bank Berhad has offered a RM150m sustainability-linked term loan with a 15 bps margin step-down if FY2026 Scope 1 emissions fall 12% year-on-year, and a 10 bps step-up if targets are missed; the draft facility agreement is under NDA.

This note addresses non-public items under the CMSA and Bursa Malaysia Listing Requirements; treat as confidential and potentially price-sensitive.
Digital asset pilot: Sinar Meridian has signed a non-binding term sheet with Ontara Digital Exchange Sdn Bhd for a ringgit-settled loyalty token pilot; exclusivity for 60 days with a RM1.2m integration fee deferred until regulatory sandbox admission by the Securities Commission Malaysia.
Commercial terms and timing remain subject to Board approval; premature disclosure could influence trading and breach information barriers.
ESG-linked financing: Bintang Raya Capital Bank Berhad has offered a RM150m sustainability-linked term loan with a 15 bps margin step-down if FY2026 Scope 1 emissions fall 12% year-on-year, and a 10 bps step-up if targets are missed; the draft facility agreement is under NDA.
Cyber incident: On 24 May, our security operations centre contained a ransomware attempt affecting three non-production servers; forensic review indicates no customer data exfiltration, but this remains non-public pending confirmation.
An updated insider list (Annex A) now includes Encik Lim Wei Hao (CFO), Dr. Norina Salleh (CIO), and the Clean Team for the Ontara pilot; access is restricted and logged per PDPA and internal policies.
Closed period: Directors and principal officers are reminded that the company enters closed period on 1 July until release of Q2 results; no dealings without pre-clearance and announcement as required by Bursa.
Information barriers: Only the Clean Team may interface with Ontara and Bintang Raya; wall-crossing requires Legal chaperone, and no tipping or selective disclosure to analysts or counterparties such as SolarNova Partners Sdn Bhd.
If materiality thresholds are met, prepare a draft immediate announcement to Bursa Malaysia and coordinate with Investor Relations to ensure equal access to information.
For avoidance of doubt, the HR e-learning module titled “Crypto and Cyber Basics” is routine training material and does not relate to the Ontara pilot or any incident.
Personal data in Annex A (names, roles, contact details) is processed for compliance purposes under the Personal Data Protection Act 2010; retain for seven years and store in the restricted “Wall Room”.
